title: Monsters and Aliens from George Lucas
content:
{{Top|rwm|ncl|ref|italics=1}} {{Noncanon|real=1}} {{ReferenceBook |image=[[File:Monstersandaliens.jpg]] |title=''Monsters and Aliens
from George Lucas'' |author=[[Bob Carrau]] |cover artist= |illustrator=*[[John Bell]] *[[Ron Cobb]] *[[Frank Connor]] *[[Joe Johnston]] *[[Barbara Lakin]] *[[Ralph McQuarrie]] *[[Ken Ralston]] *[[Nilo Rodis-Jamero]] *[[Richard Van der Wende]] |editor=[[Mark Greenberg]] |publisher=[[Abrams Books]] |release date=[[September 16]], [[1993]]{{WebCite|url=https://publicrecords.copyright.gov/detailed-record/voyager_19342484|text=Monsters and aliens from George Lucas /Bob Carrau ; foreword by George Lucas.|work=the [[Wikipedia:United States Copyright Office|U.S. Copyright Office Public Records System]]|archiveurl=https://archive.ph/AMdSf}} |type=Hardcover, Softcover |pages=64 |dimensions=0.5 x 9.5 x 12.2 inches |weight=1.6 pounds |isbn=0810936402 |series= |preceded by= |followed by= }} {{Quote|I look at this book as a collection of archaeological data—an attempt to show sides of these monsters and aliens rarely seen.|[[George Lucas]], foreword|''[[Monsters and Aliens from George Lucas]]''}} '''''Monsters and Aliens from George Lucas''''' is a [[1993]] book by [[Bob Carrau]]. It contains biographical information for beings and creatures seen in concept art and photos from various [[Lucasfilm]] productions. ==Publisher's summary== ''Some of the most bizarre monsters & aliens ever seen populate the films of George Lucas, creator of the ''Star Wars'' trilogy. Here are portraits & descriptions of a never-before-assembled group of Lucas' eeriest strangelings & other-worldly beings. Sometimes beautiful, sometimes horrifying, & often hilarious, the 31 full-color images presented in this book are drawn from paintings of creatures seen in Lucasfilm movies, artist's renderings of oddballs not yet built, film stills, & photos. The text is an amusing compendium of interesting personal data in the form of diary entries, recipes, resumes [''sic''], want ads, & weight-training routines. Sufficiently witty, sophisticated, & engaging for adults, this book is scary enough for any child.'' ==Continuity== [[Leland Chee]] has indicated that information in the book is non-[[canon]]ical. However, a couple of elements have been known to make their way into continuity through other publications.{{SWBoards|url=thread.jspa?threadID=152583&start=690#14724917|thread=Holocron continuity database questions|user=[[Leland Chee|Leland Y Chee]]|date=006-05-03|time=5:45 PM|quote=And is information from Monsters and Aliens from George Lucas canon? Unless referred to by a source that is in-continuity, the information is non-continuity.}} Canonical species mentioned within the non-canonical text of the book include: [[Duros/Legends|Duros]], [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorreans]], [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]], [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorians]], and the [[Rancor/Legends|Rancor]]. Additionally, the world of [[Endor/Legends|Endor]] and the character [[Terak]] is mentioned, the latter identified as a "Known Associate" of "The Marauder of Endor". The book introduced the character [[Dyslogia Twang]], who later reappeared in ''[[HoloNet News Vol. 531 53]]''. [[Po Ruddle Lingsnot]], a character from ''[[The Illustrated Star Wars Universe]]'', appears to also have been inspired by this book. ''[[Musings of an Ithorian]]'' was later republished on [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]]. "[[Smapp]]," "[[Barium liquid]]" and "[[Manta pear]]" were mentioned in "[[Dining at Dex's]]," a Hyperspace exclusive article. The planet [[Lusaanda]] was also indirectly mentioned in the [[Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion|Online Companion]] of ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' through the inclusion of the [[Lusaanda system/Legends|Lusaanda system]]. The tabloid ''[[Galactic Gossip]]'' was mentioned in part three of ''[[Barely Tolerable: Alien Henchmen of the Empire]]''. ==Appearances== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Monsters and Aliens from George Lucas}} {{App |characters= *[[mOKDAR 15]] *[[26-424]] *[[Ampli]] *[[Anmor-Anmor]] *[[Dixie Belle]] *[[Tireis Blackandwhite]] *[[Hortentious Clee]] *[[Dieroul]] *[[Duke (individual)|Duke]] *[[Eban]] *[[Droza Edthatt]] *[[Etro Edthatt]] *[[Zot Effervescence]] *[[Marauder of Endor]] *[[FFKR]] *[[Gragg]] *[[Massie Herhis]] *[[Bucrkam Inney]] *[[Aanxi Raanxi Laanxi]] {{!}} *[[Lerk]] *[[Lingsnots]] **[[Ciption Lingsnot]] **[[Miiliki-spoorr Lingsnot]] **[[Po Ruddle Lingsnot]] **[[Ussto Lingsnot]] *[[Madonna]] *[[Medypsh]] *[[Quocrag Mogra]] *[[Morpitoo]] *[[Lilac Nani]] *[[Manac-Nebut]] *[[The Wavering Oeklass|Oeklass]] *[[Orequelandomani]] *[[Mrp-Mrp Poo]] *[[Prod]] *[[S12x pTTt|s12X "Lefty" pTTt]] *[[Morgantha Shelroon]] *[[Skreen]] *[[Gaalt Sky Rowing team|Sky Rowing]] {{!}} *[[Rzsco Snowwt]] *[[Gall Supreme]] *[[Terak]] *[[Kaat Thrick-Thrick]] *[[Dyslogia Twang]] *[[Trebor Uarrac]] *[[UCKR.E.M.
